title: SB Trophy
description: Funny resource pack, which adds trophy of lizard from meme
body:
# Optifine or CIT Resewn is required
### To get this model, you need to rename green dye to "sb_trophy" or "Голова Ящерки"

This is funny resource pack which adds trophy of lizard.
This lizard is from youtube channel - 
[SecB](https://www.youtube.com/@SecB 'SecB')

Idea - [Bonan](https://vk.com/bonanart 'Bonan')

Made by [f_gav](https://t.me/f_gav 'f_gav')

![Alt text](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fim.wampi.ru%2F2023%2F06%2F16%2Fsb_trophy_front.png&n=-1)
